nasb.text: For what great nation is there that has a god so near to it as is the Lord our God whenever we call on Him?

esv.text: For what great nation is there that has a god so near to it as the Lord our God is to us, whenever we call upon him?

cnv.text: 哪一個大國的人有神與他們這樣親近，像耶和華我們的　神，在我們每次呼求他的時候，與我們親近一樣呢？

ccb.text: 我们的上帝耶和华与我们如此亲近，随时垂听我们的呼求，有哪个伟大民族的神明能与之相比？
